# MuleSoft WSS Module

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of WSS Module documentation.
> See [WSS Module llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/llms-full.txt) for all the WSS Module documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Apply Operation Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/apply-wss-examples.md)
- [WSS Module 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/index.md)
- [Validate Operation Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/validate-wss-examples.md)
- [WSS Module - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/wss-examples.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating WSS Module to Version 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/wss-module-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [WSS Module 2.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/wss-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure WSS Module](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/wss-studio.md)
- [WSS Module XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/wss-module/latest/wss-xml-maven.md)
